description: Source-specific readiness defaults and collection searches for the Splunk Data Source Readiness Doctor.

collection_searches.title: Firehose source and sourcetype coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen dc(host) as hosts by source sourcetype | convert ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen)

collection_searches.title: Firehose AWS profile field coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count values(eventName) as event_names values(eventSource) as event_sources dc(srcaddr) as srcs dc(dstaddr) as dests by source sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Apache Web Server coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: AppDynamics coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: CloudTrail action, source, and account coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(user) as users dc(src) as srcs values(eventSource) as event_sources by eventName aws_account_id

collection_searches.title: CloudTrail authentication/change candidate fields
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | eval action=coalesce(action,eventName) | stats count values(errorCode) as error_codes values(eventSource) as event_sources by user src action

collection_searches.title: OCSF class/category/activity coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count by class_name class_uid category_name category_uid activity_name activity_id sourcetype

collection_searches.title: OCSF-to-CIM bridge candidate fields
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | head 500 | table _time sourcetype class_name activity_name src_endpoint.ip dst_endpoint.ip actor.user.name device.uid

packs.label: AWS Security Hub and GuardDuty Findings

collection_searches.title: AWS Security Hub severity and resource coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count values(Severity.Label) as severities values(Title) as titles by AwsAccountId ResourceId ProductArn

collection_searches.title: AWS VPC flow action and peer coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(src_ip) as srcs dc(dest_ip) as dests values(action) as actions by interface_id src_port dest_port protocol

collection_searches.title: Blue Coat ProxySG coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Box coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Check Point Log Exporter coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: ASA traffic action and peer coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(src) as srcs dc(dest) as dests values(action) as actions by dvc sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Cisco ESA and WSA coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Cisco ISE coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Cisco Meraki coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Secure Access firewall decisions
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count values(action) as actions values(url) as urls dc(user) as users by src dest sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Secure Firewall EventType coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(InitiatorIP) as initiators dc(ResponderIP) as responders values(AC_RuleAction) as rule_actions by EventType

collection_searches.title: Secure Firewall intrusion and file disposition coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now (EventType=IntrusionEvent OR EventType=FileEvent) | stats count values(PriorityID) as priority values(SHA_Disposition) as dispositions by EventType SignatureID

collection_searches.title: Cisco UCS coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Citrix NetScaler coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: CrowdStrike endpoint event coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(aid) as agents dc(ComputerName) as hosts dc(UserName) as users by event_simpleName FileName

collection_searches.title: CyberArk EPM coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: CyberArk EPV/PTA coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Duo authentication and admin outcome coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(user) as users dc(src) as srcs values(result) as results values(factor) as factors by sourcetype reason

collection_searches.title: F5 BIG-IP coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Forcepoint Web Security coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: FortiGate traffic and UTM action coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(src) as srcs dc(dest) as dests values(action) as actions values(app) as apps by sourcetype dvc

packs.label: GitHub Audit Logs And Security Alerts

collection_searches.title: GitHub audit action and repository coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(actor) as actors dc(repo) as repos values(operation_type) as operations by sourcetype action org

collection_searches.title: GitHub security scanning alert coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now sourcetype IN ("github:cloud:code:scanning:alerts","github:cloud:dependabot:scanning:alerts","github:cloud:secret:scanning:alerts") | stats count by sourcetype state severity

collection_searches.title: Google Cloud Platform coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Google Workspace source type coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(actor.email) as users dc(ipAddress) as srcs values(events.name) as event_names by sourcetype app events.type

collection_searches.title: HAProxy coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Infoblox coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Kubernetes audit verb and response coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count values(responseStatus.code) as response_codes values('annotations.authorization.k8s.io/decision') as authz_decisions by verb objectRef.resource user.username

collection_searches.title: Linux authentication and privilege activity
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count values(action) as actions values(app) as apps dc(user) as users by host sourcetype

collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(host) as hosts dc(source) as sources by sourcetype

collection_searches.title: Windows Security EventCode coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now (source="XmlWinEventLog:Security" OR source="WinEventLog:Security" OR Channel=Security) | stats count dc(user) as users dc(dest) as dests by EventCode EventID signature action

collection_searches.title: Windows authentication/process candidates
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now (EventCode=4624 OR EventCode=4625 OR EventCode=4688 OR EventID=4624 OR EventID=4625 OR EventID=4688) | stats count values(Logon_Type) as logon_types values(New_Process_Name) as processes by EventCode EventID user dest src

collection_searches.title: Zscaler web and firewall action coverage
collection_searches.spl: %BASE_SEARCH% earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count dc(user) as users dc(src) as srcs dc(dest) as dests values(action) as actions by sourcetype urlcategory threatname
